backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor definition with an empty actor body, serving as the backend entry point.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report file with an empty features array, indicating no features have been documented yet.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend file's purpose and key contents for the VERDIER COUVERTURE project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: SEO-optimized HTML entry point for VERDIER COUVERTURE with meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, Google site verification, canonical link, Google Fonts, and JSON-LD structured data.
frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.h: Static Google Search Console ownership verification file containing the verification meta tag and required body text.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full single-page layout by composing Navigation, Hero, Services, About, Testimonials, Contact, ServiceAreas, and Footer sections.
frontend/src/components/About.tsx: Two-column about section presenting VERDIER COUVERTURE's history since 2004, three value propositions, certifications, and a stats grid — all in French.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Contact section with a validated devis request form, phone/email/address info cards, opening hours, and an emergency CTA — all in French.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Four-column footer with brand info, clickable phone and email links, address, service/navigation links, zone d'intervention, copyright, and caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section for VERDIER COUVERTURE with a background image, headline, geo-targeted subheadline (Val-d'Oise), highlight badges, and smooth-scroll CTA buttons to contact and services sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware background, smooth-scroll anchor links, a phone CTA, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/components/ServiceAreas.tsx: SEO-focused section listing ~40 Val-d'Oise communes served by VERDIER COUVERTURE as a tag cloud, plus a grid of roofing service keywords for local search visibility.
frontend/src/components/Services.tsx: Displays a grid of six roofing services (réfection, tuiles/ardoises, réparation, isolation, zinguerie, traitement) each with an image, description, and feature list.
frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx: Renders a grid of six five-star customer testimonials with name, location, service type, date, and star rating component for VERDIER COUVERTURE.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor or identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions and status flags. Includes an `InternetIdentityProvider` component that persists identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines a warm earthy roofing-themed design system using OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark modes. Also defines reusable component utility classes like `.btn-terracotta` and section heading styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with `QueryClientProvider` (React Query) and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based brand colors (terracotta, slate, offwhite), serif/sans font families, border radius tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 19) for the VERDIER COUVERTURE roofing landing page, listing existing features, known issues (missing `itemReviewed` in structured data), architectural notes, and pending fix requests.
